meaning: n.[化]用硝酸处理,硝化,硝基置换
examples: The nitration of this may lead to dinitrotoluene.
The nitration of this may lead to dinitrotoluene .
The nitration of pcymene may lead to dinitrotoluene.
Furthermore, the peroxynitrite-mediated nitration of tau proteins prevent them from being reconstituted to their normal form.
One mechanism of oxidative damage is the nitration of tyrosine residues in proteins, mediated by peroxynitrite breakdown.
